$statusLegend.ported: byte-equivalent to upstream (CI fails on drift)
$statusLegend.adapted: TypeScript port and/or namespace swap; logically equivalent
$statusLegend.extended: fork adds behavior on top of upstream
$statusLegend.added: file unique to the fork (no upstream)

files.notes: name + textdomain swapped to artisanpack namespace; allowedBlocks rewired from core/column to artisanpack/column; attributes/supports/styles otherwise verbatim.
TypeScript port. Inner-block defaultBlock and column inserter checks target artisanpack/column. Adds explicit 'wp-block-columns' class to useBlockProps so editor matches frontend.
TypeScript port; class list adds 'wp-block-columns' explicitly.
Three legacy entries ported. v2 migrate() now creates artisanpack/column children.

Upstream multi-block + media-text transforms preserved (now emit artisanpack/column inner blocks). Added bidirectional block transforms for core/columns ↔ artisanpack/columns. ungroup behavior preserved.
TypeScript port; inline SVG icons (no @wordpress/components Path/SVG dep); all inner-block templates target artisanpack/column.
Combined SCSS-to-CSS port. The Sass $break-medium variable (782px) is inlined as a literal media query. native-only RTL ignore comments dropped.
Inline SVG for the inserter (editor doesn't bundle dashicons).
Adapted to the visual-editor auto-discovery contract. Exports variations so they can be registered via @wordpress/blocks.registerBlockVariation.

knownDivergences: block.json allowedBlocks rewired from core/column to artisanpack/column — required so the artisanpack/columns parent only accepts the artisanpack/column fork.
edit.tsx hard-codes COLUMN_BLOCK = 'artisanpack/column' across defaultBlock, canInsertBlockType, updateColumns, and the placeholder so child columns never fall back to core/column.
transforms.ts adds bidirectional block transforms between core/columns and artisanpack/columns and rewrites all inner-block templates to artisanpack/column.

variations.tsx replaces @wordpress/components Path/SVG with raw inline SVG so the variation picker doesn't depend on extra runtime imports, and rewrites every inner-block template to artisanpack/column.
columns.css inlines the upstream Sass $break-medium breakpoint (782px) as literal media queries.
index.ts swaps upstream's PHP-side init wiring for the visual-editor auto-discovery contract and exports variations.
Native files (edit.native.js, editor.native.scss, transforms.native.js, columnCalculations.native.js, test/) are intentionally not ported — desktop web only.
